action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed due to torch.load weights_only default in PyTorch 2.6+. Training showed 0.808 val balanced_acc but heavy overfitting. Analysis: Need weights_only=False fix and stronger regularization. Decision: Fix predict.py, enhance training with mixup/cutmix, stronger augmentation, label smoothing, train 30 epochs.
